title: argemone pinnatisecta
intro: Argemone pinnatisecta, also known as prickly poppy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the poppy family and is native to India and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Argemone pinnatisecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
